assertions.assertion: Hook green output, trusted-looking receipts, or host hook mode alone cannot complete delivery closeout.
assertions.proof: Delivery Closeout Gate now evaluates requirement-record.hookReconciliation and blocks degraded/untrusted hooks unless no-hook or bounded replay fallback evidence is present and reconciled.

assertions.assertion: Missing hook receipts, hook sequence gaps, and hook hash mismatches must block closeout.
assertions.proof: Acceptance test blocks closeout for missing PostToolUse receipt, sequence gap, runtime policy hash mismatch, missing fallback refs, and closeoutReconciled=false.

assertions.assertion: Hook reconciliation cannot use legacy result as a control field.
assertions.proof: Requirement-record schema and controlled ingest reject hookReconciliation.result.
